layout_settings.section_title:
At home in
The City in a Park
layout_settings.section_h2: Set Beside the Lawn and Promenade of Bellevue Downtown Park
layout_settings.section_text: Park Row sits directly on Bellevue Downtown Park — the city’s most iconic green space, and the most coveted destination to call home.

layout_settings.section_title:
Balanced Living
in the Heart of Downtown
layout_settings.section_h2: From Park Row, Access is Easy.
layout_settings.section_text: Bellevue, where park front serenity and downtown vitality exist in seamless balance, and every destination begins at your doorstep.

Bellevue continues its trajectory as a major regional economic center with more than 160,000 jobs city-wide and projections that employment will grow beyond 190,000 by 2035, a testament to sustained business confidence and quality of life.

Leading employers have expanded their presence here, bringing global impact and local vitality. Amazon maintains a large and growing workforce, Meta operates one of its largest hubs outside Silicon Valley, T-Mobile’s U.S. headquarters is a cornerstone of innovation, and Salesforce continues to grow its footprint.

Since 2021, Bellevue has added nearly 3.9 million square feet of new office space, nearly outpacing similar growth in nearby markets and reflecting strong demand from technology, business services, and growth sectors.
This economic momentum brings talent and energy to the city, while making Bellevue a highly desirable place to live, work, and build community.

images.caption: City Growth
images.section_text:
Bellevue continues its trajectory as a major regional economic center with more than 160,000 jobs city-wide and projections that employment will grow beyond 190,000 by 2035, a testament to sustained business confidence and quality of life.

Leading employers have expanded their presence here, bringing global impact and local vitality. Amazon maintains a large and growing workforce, Meta operates one of its largest hubs outside Silicon Valley, T-Mobile’s U.S. headquarters is a cornerstone of innovation, and Salesforce continues to grow its footprint.

Since 2021, Bellevue has added nearly 3.9 million square feet of new office space, nearly outpacing similar growth in nearby markets and reflecting strong demand from technology, business services, and growth sectors.
This economic momentum brings talent and energy to the city, while making Bellevue a highly desirable place to live, work, and build community.

images.caption: The Grand Connection
images.section_h3: Connected by Design and Thoughtfully Planned
images.section_text:
Bellevue’s thoughtful urban planning reinforces its connectivity and live-work-play experience, expanding walkability, public transit options, and regional connections like light rail that link Bellevue with adjacent cities and cultural hubs.

The city’s commitment to a human-scaled environment makes everyday living efficient and effortless, whether commuting, shopping, dining, or exploring cultural offerings.

images.caption: Maydenbauer Bay Park
images.section_text: Beyond Downtown Park, Bellevue’s network of parks, green corridors, and waterfront access invites recreation and wellness. Kayaking, paddleboarding, sailing, and lakeside walks on Lake Washington blend with neighborhood trails, picnic lawns, and cultivated gardens that shape a life in balance with nature.

Bellevue is a city defined by purposeful growth, cultural richness, and quality of life. Residents choose Bellevue because of its diversity of experiences, employment opportunities, and unmatched urban amenities embedded within a natural setting.

Park Row places residents at the intersection of all these forces — where green space and connectivity enrich daily living, where proximity to restaurants, boutiques, waterfront paths, and community destinations shapes every day, and where home becomes the place you want to be most.

seo.title: Living in Downtown Bellevue | Park Row Condominiums
seo.description: Explore Bellevue’s vibrant lifestyle, parks, and dining surrounding Park Row Luxury Condos - where urban convenience meets serene Pacific Northwest living.
